zh.Thorpe Bassett, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾索普 巴塞特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Hastings於大約1295年出生在英國越可爾索普 巴塞特時，他的父親Nicholas de Hastings20歲，母親Agnes de Fillongley26歲。他於大約1321年與Margaret Herle在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1346年登記服兵役。他於1337年被列為sheriff of yorkshire。他去世於1346年10月17日在英國達勒姆內維爾也斯 克羅斯享年52歲，埋葬在英國越可爾塞爾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Hastings于大约1295年出生在英国越可爾索普 巴塞特时，他的父亲Nicholas de Hastings20岁，母亲Agnes de Fillongley26岁。他于大约1321年与Margaret Herle在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1346年登记服兵役。他于1337年被列为sheriff of yorkshire。他去世于1346年10月17日在英国達勒姆內維爾也斯 克羅斯享年52岁，埋葬在英国越可爾塞爾比。

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Hastings was born about 1295, in Thorpe Bassett, Yorkshire, England, his father, Nicholas de Hastings, was 20 and his mother, Agnes de Fillongley, was 26. He married Margaret Herle about 1321, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He registered for military service in 1346. In 1337, at the age of 43, his occupation is listed as sheriff of yorkshire. He died on 17 October 1346, in Neville's Cross, Durham, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Selby, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Hastings est né environ 1295, à Thorpe Bassett, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas de Hastings, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Fillongley, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Herle environ 1321, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1346. En 1337, à l’âge de 43 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of yorkshire. Il est décédé le 17 octobre 1346, à Neville's Cross, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Selby, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Hastings um 1295 in Thorpe Bassett, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas de Hastings 20 und seine Mutter Agnes de Fillongley 26. Er hat um 1321 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Herle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er hat sich 1346 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1337, als er 43 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of yorkshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 17. Oktober 1346 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Neville's Cross, Durham, England und wurde in Selby, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Hastings è nato il circa 1295 nel Thorpe Bassett, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas de Hastings, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Fillongley, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Herle circa 1321, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1346. Nel 1337, all'età di 43 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of yorkshire. Morì il 17 ottobre 1346, nel Neville's Cross, Durham, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Selby, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Thorpe Bassett, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアソルペ バセット
ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Hastingsが約1295年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルペ バセットで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Hastingsは20歳，母Agnes de Fillongleyは26歳であった。約1321年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでMargaret Herleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1346年に兵役登録をした。1337年，43歳の時，職業はsheriff of yorkshireと記録されている。彼は1346年10月17日にイギリスダルハムネヴィレ'ス クロスで52歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアセルビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Hastings(이)가 대략 1295년 영국 요르크실르 소 배싯에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas de Hastings(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Fillongley(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1321년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Margaret Herle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1346년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1337년, 43세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of yorkshire이었다. 그는 1346년 10월 17일 영국 뒤람 네비레'스 크로스에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 셀비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Hastings nasceu aproximadamente 1295, em Thorpe Bassett, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas de Hastings, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Fillongley, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Herle aproximadamente 1321, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1346. Em 1337, com 43 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of yorkshire. Ele faleceu em 17 de outubro de 1346, em Neville's Cross, Durham, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Selby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Hastings родился около 1295 г. в местности таурп бассетт, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas de Hastings было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Fillongley, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Herle около 1321 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1346 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1337 году, в возрасте 43 лет, работал по профессии sheriff of yorkshire. Он умер 17 октября 1346 г. в местности невилле'с кросс, дурам, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности селби, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Hastings nació aproximadamente 1295, en Thorpe Bassett, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas de Hastings, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Agnes de Fillongley, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret Herle aproximadamente 1321, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1346. En 1337, a la edad de 43 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of yorkshire. Murió el 17 de octubre de 1346, en Neville's Cross, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Selby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
